title: Day 0-1: Repo Init — pnpm Monorepo + MCP Server Skeleton + stdio-lint
description: Bootstrap the Fabric v2.0 monorepo from the near-empty pcf directory. Rename conceptual root to 'fabric', initialize pnpm workspace with 3 packages (server, cli, shared), install @modelcontextprotocol/sdk@^1 + zod@^3 + tsup + lefthook, scaffold MCP server with 3 tool skeletons (fab_get_rules, fab_append_intent, fab_update_registry) using McpServer + StdioServerTransport, and configure lefthook to reject console.log in packages/server (stdio lint). All files created from scratch — the only existing file is 思路.md which must not be modified.

files.change: pnpm monorepo root with lefthook devDependency and workspace scripts
declare packages/server, packages/cli, packages/shared as workspace members
@modelcontextprotocol/sdk@^1, zod@^3 deps; type:module; build script via tsup
McpServer + StdioServerTransport setup; register 3 empty tool skeletons with MANDATORY tool descriptions; all logging to process.stderr only
citty dep; bin field pointing to dist/index.js; type:module
module:Node16, strict:true, same pattern as server
citty defineCommand entry; empty subcommand stubs (init, sync-meta, human-lint, ledger-append, scan)
shared types package; no runtime deps; type:module
pre-commit hook: run stdio-lint script on packages/server/**/*.ts; reject if console.log found
grep packages/server/src for console.log|console.error|console.warn (only stderr via process.stderr allowed); exit 1 on match
Base tsconfig inherited by all packages with common strict settings

implementation: Create root package.json with pnpm workspace config, lefthook devDependency, and pnpm -r build/dev scripts
Create pnpm-workspace.yaml listing packages/* as workspace members
Scaffold packages/shared with package.json and empty src/index.ts for shared type exports

Scaffold packages/server with package.json (@modelcontextprotocol/sdk@^1, zod@^3, tsup), tsconfig.json (module:Node16, type:module), and src/index.ts with McpServer + StdioServerTransport; register fab_get_rules, fab_append_intent, fab_update_registry with MANDATORY-prefixed descriptions; all output to process.stderr
Scaffold packages/cli with package.json (citty, tsup), tsconfig.json, and src/index.ts with citty defineCommand stubs for 5 subcommands
Create lefthook.yml with pre-commit stdio-lint hook targeting packages/server/src
Create scripts/lint-stdio.mjs that greps for console.* in server source and exits 1 on match
Run pnpm install and verify pnpm -r detects 3 packages; run tsup build for server; verify npx @modelcontextprotocol/inspector lists 3 tools

reference.pattern: McpServer + StdioServerTransport from @modelcontextprotocol/sdk; pnpm workspace monorepo
reference.examples: See mcp-first-fabric.md §2 for 5-layer architecture; MCP SDK v1.29 README for McpServer API; lefthook docs for pre-commit hook config

criteria: pnpm install succeeds with 0 errors; pnpm -r detects exactly 3 packages (server, cli, shared)
packages/server imports McpServer + StdioServerTransport from @modelcontextprotocol/sdk@^1 without type errors; zod@^3 resolvable; module:Node16 + type:module in tsconfig
npx @modelcontextprotocol/inspector node packages/server/dist/index.js tools/list returns exactly 3 tools: fab_get_rules, fab_append_intent, fab_update_registry
Adding console.log to packages/server/src/index.ts triggers lefthook pre-commit rejection with non-zero exit code
思路.md is unmodified (git diff shows no changes to it)

rationale.chosen_approach: pnpm monorepo with 3 separate packages for clean separation of concerns; McpServer API (not low-level protocol) for MCP implementation
alternatives_considered: Single package (simpler but couples server and CLI)
npm workspaces (pnpm preferred per brainstorm decisions)
HTTP transport instead of stdio (stdio is the locked decision; HTTP only if KS-2 fires)
decision_factors: Locked in synthesis.json: pnpm monorepo, @modelcontextprotocol/sdk@^1, zod@^3
stdio MCP MUST NOT write to stdout — enforcement via lefthook is critical for protocol correctness
module:Node16 required for ESM/CJS interop with MCP SDK
rationale.tradeoffs: module:Node16 adds verbosity to imports (explicit .js extensions) but is required for MCP SDK compatibility

manual_checks: Run pnpm install from repo root — must succeed with 0 errors
Run pnpm -r build — all 3 packages build without TypeScript errors
Run npx @modelcontextprotocol/inspector node packages/server/dist/index.js — tools/list must show 3 tools
Add console.log to packages/server/src/index.ts, run git commit — lefthook must block with clear error
Remove console.log, run git commit — lefthook must pass
success_metrics: 0 TypeScript compilation errors across all 3 packages
lefthook blocks in <1s on console.log detection

risks.description: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk@^1.29 API surface may differ from examples in brainstorm docs
risks.mitigation: Read actual SDK source/README before implementing server; use McpServer.tool() registration API
risks.fallback: Pin exact version @1.29.0 if semver range causes issues

risks.description: module:Node16 import resolution requires explicit .js extensions in TypeScript source
risks.mitigation: Configure tsup to handle this; document in tsconfig comment
risks.fallback: Use bundler moduleResolution if Node16 causes widespread friction

interfaces.name: FabUpdateRegistryInput
interfaces.definition: { op: 'add-node' | 'remove-node' | 'update-node'; node_id: string; data?: Record<string, unknown> }
interfaces.purpose: Input schema for fab_update_registry MCP tool

key_functions.purpose: Factory function that creates and configures the MCP server with all 3 tools registered
key_functions.returns: McpServer instance ready for transport attachment

key_functions.purpose: Main entry: creates server, attaches StdioServerTransport, connects
